extra_commands: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3000/ -o /tmp/qrb_home.html && node -e "const h=require('fs').readFileSync('/tmp/qrb_home.html','utf8');console.log('RAW_HERO_KEY',h.includes('hero.badge'));console.log('UNAVAILABLE',h.includes('temporarily unavailable'));console.log('REPLACE_LOGOS',h.includes('Replace with real client logos'));console.log('REAL_TITLE',h.includes('Dynamic QR Codes That Never'));" && rm -f /tmp/qrb_home.html
